title: Object 499
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:'''Object 499: "Kharthic Energy"'''}} {{CSS|content= /* Page */ .page { border: solid 3px rgba(255, 255, 255, 1); margin-top: 12px; position: relative; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: 1px 1px 30px rgba(255, 255, 255, 1); } /* Darkmode CSS */ .theme-fandomdesktop-dark { --theme-page-background-color: black; --theme-page-background-color--secondary: rgba(8, 0, 16, 1); --theme-link-color: rgba(235, 157, 255, 1); --theme-border-color: black; .page-side-tool { border: solid 2px color here; box-shadow: 0px 0px 5px color white; } --theme-community-header-color: white; --theme-sticky-nav-background-color: white; --theme-sticky-nav-text-color: color here; --theme-sticky-nav-text-color--hover: white; } /* Lightmode CSS */ .theme-fandomdesktop-light { --theme-page-background-color: rgba(235, 179, 255, 0.9); --theme-page-background-color--secondary: rgba(221, 124, 255, 0.9); --theme-link-color: rgba(166, 91, 185, 1); --theme-border-color: color here; .page-side-tool { border: solid 2px color here; box-shadow: 0px 0px 5px color here; } --theme-community-header-color: color here; --theme-sticky-nav-background-color: color here; --theme-sticky-nav-text-color: color here; --theme-sticky-nav-text-color--hover: color here; }}} {{CSS|content= html .resizable-container, .page-content h1, .page-content h2, .page-content h3, .page-content h4, .page-content h5, .page-content h6 { font-family:Noto Sans Display}} {{CSS|content= @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+Display:ital,wght@0,100..900;1,100..900&display=swap'); }} {{RecommendedAudioNest|audio={{Audio|round=yes|file=The fog surrounds you 2.mp3|align=center|loop=true|volume=0.4}}|text=enable page ambience for best experience:}}

  ✴ '''DESCRIPTION'''
{{Blurimage|width=300px|align=right|file=Kharthicvial.png|caption=Kharthic Energy contained in a transparent storage cell. Note the chromatic glow.}} '''Kharthic Energy''' (alternatively "'''Kharthiact'''"), is a form of Backrooms-native energy transmitted through [[Achospic_Plane|psychic noise.]] Similarly to sound or heat, '''Kharthic Energy''' travels in the form of waves, harboring a range of different frequencies which alter its general effects. '''Kharthic Energy''' does not require a transmission medium to move between areas and is thus able to travel through a vacuum. Additionally, '''Kharthic Energy''' cannot pass through matter. Due to such properties, it is believed that certain entities in the Backrooms may have the unique ability to sense the reception of '''Kharthiact,''' though this remains unconfirmed. '''Kharthiact''' is measured in RY (Reyennes), named after Swedish physicist Fredrik Reyenne who was the first to document and record his observations regarding '''Kharthic Energy.''' [[The Frontrooms]] is the only known example of a location possessing an absolute zero of '''Kharthic Energy;''' measured at 0RY. Most levels hover in the range of 2-3RY. A lethal dose of '''Kharthiact''' depends on the individual, though exposure to ~550RY for approximately 60 seconds may be considered fatal for most. It is important to note that Reyennes are measured on a logarithmic scale, meaning that every integer increase in Reyennes is equivalent to double the amount of '''Kharthic Energy.'''
  ✴ '''INTERACTION'''
One of the most notable properties of '''Kharthic Energy''' is its exceptional efficiency in producing and refracting light. High amounts of '''Kharthic Energy''' tend to produce a faint prismatic glare as a result of the refraction. Attempts have been made to utilize this property as a form of renewable and reliable lighting, although the drawbacks of '''Kharthic Energy's''' effects on the human mind have made this endeavor aimless. Human exposure to high levels of '''Kharthic Energy''' tends to cause heightened anxiety, paranoia, and tension in the individual's mind. While the exact reasons behind why are unknown, these symptoms link to a considerable increase in adrenaline production alongside random neuron firings in the occipital and parietal lobe of the afflicted individual. These can cause extreme levels of stress, disorientation, and severe triggers in the fight-or-flight response. Non-mental symptoms such as twitching and inconsistent flashing in the eyes may also be prevalent depending on the received frequencies of '''Kharthiact.''' '''Kharthic Energy''' is able to interfere with electrical currents, posing as a large obstacle to understanding information regarding its origins. Stray waves of high-frequency '''Kharthiact''' are prone to flipping or meddling with bits in computer memory. As a result, using drones or remote-operated machines to mitigate the effects of '''Kharthic Energy''' during research is essentially infeasible, as they are highly susceptible to corruption. On rare occasions, retrieved data from these corrupted devices can be decoded.
  ✴ '''FREQUENCIES'''
The rate of psychic noise vibration, alongside other factors, can determine the specific frequency of a '''Kharthic Energy''' wave. As for sound, '''Kharthic Energy''' uses the Hz system for determining frequency. {| class="fandom-table" |+Frequency Effect Index !Frequency (Hz) !Effects (assuming ~300 RY dosage) |- |< 15 Hz |Severe symptoms of schizophrenia and visual/audial hallucinations. Emits no light whatsoever. |- |15-800 Hz |Symptoms of schizophrenia, anxiety, and audial hallucinations. Emits minimal levels of light, but does not refract. |- |800-4,200 Hz |Paranoia, anxiety, and mild hallucinations. Slight random neuron firings in the occipital and parietal lobes of the brain. |- |4,200-9,000 Hz |Mental tension, stress, and triggers in the fight-or-flight response. Emits and refracts light very efficiently. |- |9,000-14,000 Hz |High prevalence of random neuron firings in the occipital and parietal lobes of the brain, causing disorientation and stress. |- |> 14,000 Hz |Adrenaline and noradrenaline production increased to exceedingly high rates, as well as severe mental tension. |}
  ✴ '''PRODUCTION'''
'''Kharthic Energy''' is typically formed as a result of psychic noise collisions, in which psychic radiation collides with itself and is converted into '''Kharthiact''' as a product. This process tends to generate minimal amounts, however, as collisions are relatively unlikely due to their atomic size. Since [[Phenomenon 9|Tulpae]] are manifestations produced from the Achospic Plane, they are also known to form '''Kharthic Energy''' when interacting with objects as a converted form of sound energy. As a result, sounds made by Tulpae are softer than usual. The core of [[Level 500]] is additionally known to generate immense amounts of '''Kharthic Energy.''' While studies on the core are limited due to its corrupting effects on retrieved information, it is assumed to operate in a manner similar to stars from the Frontrooms. Particles of psychic radiation — specifically those with a greater influence against matter — collect in the core's center, where fusion occurs and generates '''Kharthic Energy.''' Research on Level 500 has concluded that the level likely distributes excess '''Kharthic Energy''' to nearby levels; levels with a shorter "distance" to itself such as [[Fragmentation]] receive far more in quantity than those which are "further".
  ✴ '''DOMESTIC USAGE'''
{{Blurimage|width=300px|align=right|file=Kharthic meth.jpg|caption=An advert showcasing a Kharthiact-based recreational drug. Source unknown.}} Small canisters storing '''Kharthic Energy''' can rarely be found across the Backrooms, with appearance rates having no preference for any particular levels (aside from those which do not harbor objects). The only known means of containing '''Kharthic Energy''' is through certain patterns of supplying electricity to solid zirconium metal; when holding an electrical charge, zirconium can absorb waves of '''Kharthic Energy''' on its surface. When electrocuted once more with a pulse rather than a held charge, '''Kharthic Energy''' can be released from the metal. Since November 4th, 2018, the [[Republic of Aurielle]] has begun testing the effects of high-frequency '''Kharthic Energy''' as a means of improving the performance of soldiers in combat. Due to its properties of producing adrenaline in the brain, dosages of '''Kharthic Energy''' supplied to soldiers' nervous systems are believed to be able to boost their physical capabilities. Consequently, however, obstacles have been encountered regarding the unfavorable side effects of paranoia and anxiety as a result.
  ✴ '''BIOLOGICAL USAGE'''
The use of '''Kharthic Energy''' in the biological processes of entities is speculative at best, as no confirmed instances of life using it to their advantage are currently known. It is theorized that [[Lamenting Sinners]] emit low frequencies of '''Kharthic Energy''' as a form of self-defense against wanderers. While variant B of such entity emits the energy in minimal levels with an average of 20-30RY, variants A and C are capable of causing greater effects of mental turmoil and hallucinations.
